CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(ClosedDate), "", IF( (ClosedDate - CreatedDate) < (1 / 24), "<1 Hour", IF( FLOOR(ClosedDate - CreatedDate) > 0, TEXT(FLOOR(ClosedDate - CreatedDate)) & IF(FLOOR(ClosedDate - CreatedDate) = 1, " Day", " Days"), "" ) & IF( AND( FLOOR(MOD((ClosedDate - CreatedDate) * 24, 24)) > 0, FLOOR(ClosedDate - CreatedDate) >= 0 ), IF(FLOOR(ClosedDate - CreatedDate) > 0, ", ", "") & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD((ClosedDate - CreatedDate) * 24, 24))) & IF(FLOOR(MOD((ClosedDate - CreatedDate) * 24, 24)) = 1, " Hour", " Hours"), "" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Case Elapsed Time
